title: sertula polonica
intro: Sertula polonica, also known as burnet-saxifrage, is a perennial plant native to Europe, known for its distinctive white and pink flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Sertula polonica include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Sertula polonica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Sertula polonica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried herb for medicinal purposes, and its leaves can also be used in salads or as a cooking green.
